title: Abu Dhabi Grand Prix Air Race
description: Opening race of the season above the iconic Corniche waterfront. Pilots navigate a low-level slalom course at 370 km/h.

title: Budapest Air Race
description: The beloved Budapest race returns along the Danube river, with the Chain Bridge as a spectacular backdrop.

title: San Diego Coastal Challenge
description: A fan-favorite over the Pacific coastline, featuring tight hairpin turns and a final dash above the bay.

title: Chiba Bay Race
description: Japan's premier air race over Tokyo Bay. A technically demanding track that rewards precision over raw speed.

title: Spielberg Mountain Race
description: An alpine circuit in the Austrian mountains, combining steep altitude changes with hairpin pylons.

title: Porto Seafront Race
description: Low-level passes over the Douro river estuary make Porto one of the most scenic stops on the circuit.

title: Indianapolis Speedway Flyover
description: A unique race where the legendary oval track is used as a reference course for the aerial slalom above.

title: Cannes Riviera Sprint
description: Season finale above the French Riviera. Championship points are doubled, making this the most dramatic race of the year.
